'''鈭歴h-b-dh-z''' ('''kashabdhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vassalise|vassalise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vassalise|vassalise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-b-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kashabdhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishabdhezoko|thishabdhezoko]] || [[word:jishabdhezoko|jishabdhezoko]] || [[word:shishabdhezoko|shishabdhezoko]] || [[word:kishabdhezoko|kishabdhezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushabdhezoko|thuthushabdhezoko]] || [[word:jujushabdhezoko|jujushabdhezoko]] || [[word:shushushabdhezoko|shushushabdhezoko]] || [[word:kukushabdhezoko|kukushabdhezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
